response.overview: After Andrés ends a toxic relationship with Valeria, he realizes that what he truly wants is to replace the woman he believes was the love of his life, Antonia. This sparks a desperate search for someone who can give him what Antonia once did. His journey leads him to fall in love with a mannequin—an object brought to life solely by his own psychological fantasies. However, this illusion shatters when this faceless sphinx, which is nothing but a mirror of his own emptiness, forces him to confront what he actually needs: learning to love himself.
response.tagline: Seeking to replace his ex, a lonely screenwriter projects his ideal romance onto a mannequin, only to discover that the love he truly needs must come from within.
response.title: A mannequin story
